name: email_offer
input:
Subject: Offer - Cardiac ICU - Nashville TN

Hi,

Formal offer for a 13-week Cardiac ICU contract at Vanderbilt UMC, Nashville, TN:

- Taxable: $40/hr
- Weekly housing: $1700
- Weekly meals: $385
- Weekly travel: $250
- 36hr guaranteed, 3x12 nights
- Start 8/4/2026, end 11/2/2026
- Sign-on: $2000 paid first check
- Completion: $2500
- OT after 40 at $60/hr
- Cancel: 14 days written notice
- Required: BLS, ACLS, CCRN

- Mark
